metadata.title: FTL Jub
metadata.author: Hephalumpo, JubJub
metadata.description:
This addon adds some missions and ships relating to JubJub
- (0.1.00) Added the Jubship and the Soviet Lunar Ship - (0.1.18) Added JubJub as a character - (0.1.26) Added Dung Magnet Augment - (0.1.36) Added Ship Unlock Images for Jubship - (0.2.00) Added basic Jub Quests into game files - (0.2.76) Added Green Soup Augment and developed quests - (0.2.98) Added Soviet Race - (0.2.115) Added Dung Torpedoes - (0.3.00) Added Horse and Crab Race - (0.3.60) Added Soviet Missions - (0.3.78) Added Sputnik Drone - (1.0.0) Version 1.0.0 Release! - (1.0.18) Added JubJub Beam
